title: Encyclia brachycolumna
taxonomy: Encyclia brachycolumna is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This species is further categorized within the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Cymbidieae. The genus Encyclia, to which Encyclia brachycolumna belongs, is a group of epiphytic orchids native to the Americas. The species is also known to be part of the Encyclia clade, which is a group of closely related species. Encyclia brachycolumna's classification is a result of its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.

intro: Encyclia brachycolumna, also known as the Columned Encyclia, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America.
